## Value bullets (for any talking-point moment)

- You've got 4.9/5 from 127+ reviews — that's social proof your competitors can't match, but right now it lives on Google Maps where customers have to find you. The site puts it front and center.
- One click → call you directly from any phone. Family Dentistry customers in Hampton, GA won't bounce to a competitor while searching for your number.
- Contact form captures leads while you're with another customer. Every missed call right now is a customer your competitor is winning.

## Objection handling

**I already get plenty of business from word-of-mouth.**
→ Totally — word-of-mouth is what got you to 127 reviews. The site catches the customers who heard your name but Googled before calling. That's the 30% you don't know you're missing.

**I don't have time to deal with a website.**
→ That's the whole point — we built it. You don't manage it, you don't update it. Half hour total of your time: review the copy, swap a photo if you want, then we publish.

**$2000 is too much.**
→ Fair. One new customer covers it — what's your average ticket? At Hampton, GA dentist/service rates, the site pays for itself in your first month if it converts even one walk-in or call you'd have missed.
